inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Value
inputs.description: Data to persist in memory under the configured key.

inputs.name: key
inputs.label: Key Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured storage key at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Pass-through
outputs.description: The stored value, passed unchanged for chaining.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the memory write failed.
